series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all vehicle registration applications (initial and renewal), as well as supplementary forms, and supporting documentation created and received during the registration process completed online or in person at a deputy registrar.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current, plus three years from date of registration''s expiration. Record may be imaged. If imaged, retain until validated and authenticated, then paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain current, plus three years from date of registration''s expiration. These records are retained in the BMV''''''''s driver license system., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
